{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323205046CA88B086BB391DD9E356"}"},"total":293},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7614724469687223064","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"好看……人物形象饱满，故事内容连贯，引人入胜。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1772944766,"group_id":"7579615885753584702","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NweSCRACl1ZKcIbiN0/AZXw=","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/7b92beed15144f519898bfe689051d51~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"97344777725","user_name":"喜欢沙王八的高扬"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"97344777725","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7579615885753584702","book_info":{"abstract":"长陵城皆知，礼部尚书府的大小姐命带凶劫，出生即被送入南禅寺，一养十八载。
    寺里不念佛，只教捉鬼画符。
家人初时尚探，后来母亲连生幺女都忘了知会；指腹为婚的世子也转身求娶她妹妹。
     师父一挥袖：“徒儿，你的孽缘，呸，你的善缘到了，下山去吧。”
    人人都笑尚书府大小姐是个江湖骗子。
　直到宫宴之上，百鬼夜行，红灯成血。
　　众人看见女子手持骨笛，朱砂为刃，一笛封魂。
　　自此，姜渡生三个字，响彻长陵城。
　　那日，妹妹红着眼眶扑过来：“姐姐，我…”
　　姜渡生淡淡瞥了她一眼：
“我渡生、渡死、渡厄、渡魂、渡苍生，唯独不渡没脑子的蠢货。”
　　她自诩算天算地，却没算到那个煞星。
　　
原想借他一身纯阳煞气续命。
　　功成那夜，她收拾小包袱准备跑路，却被他困在朱砂案前，眼底满是疯狂与执拗：
　　“姜渡生，你渡苍生，能不能——也渡渡我？”
　　“我从烬火中来，不求成佛，只求你渡我一个余生。”
　　后来，当他血染衣袍，在她耳边落下绝望的呢喃：“姜渡生，你算尽天机，可曾算出我会是你的情劫？”
　　“若不能在你心里占得一席之地，我甘愿…永世为鬼，受你封印。”","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/902bcbc75aa9a1ac4527d5022a396f3b","author":"脾气暴躁的吼吼","author_id":"","book_id":"7579615885753584702","book_name":"佛珠镇百鬼，煞星渡余生","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#181810","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"19.1万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":253,"name":"古言脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=253&name=古言脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":5,"name":"古代言情","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=5&name=古代言情&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":519,"name":"大小姐","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=519&name=大小姐&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":520,"name":"大佬","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=520&name=大佬&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":834,"name":"1v1","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=834&name=1v1&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":867,"name":"捉鬼","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=867&name=捉鬼&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7579642980936450622","read_count":"190146","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"488541"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.7","serial_count":"240","tags":"古言脑洞,古代言情,大小姐,大佬,1v1,捉鬼","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/5307299632d6c944f358854a5ab4020c~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779454246&x-signature=Gc2JthWeierUfPH4Jv4YyWre6Yk%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"171147882142156","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"26"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323205046CA88B086BB391DD9E356"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读1小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":1,"forw rwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":14415,"reply_count":1,"show_pv":22867},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"addition_comment":{"comment_id":"7608589279213011736","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"而且男女主的开窍过程也很甜哦，没有什么误会，并且并肩作战，双方的智商都很高超不降智，聪明人跟聪明人说话一点都不费劲。后面男主喜欢上了就打直球，女主一开始是木头后面也看清了自己的内心"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1771514893,"group_id":"7579615885753584702","service_id":13,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"100971913768"}},"expand":{"book_id":"7579615885753584702","book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"272"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读9小时后追评"},"stat":{"digg_count":0,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":3,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":33479,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":0},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"comment_id":"7608588399500034840","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"很好看，文采好，句子都很高级。女主渡生清醒独立，很强大，是佛道双修抓鬼能力强，渡众生。男主谢烬尘同样强大，身怀帝王紫气，渡生和世子是阴阳体质能互补，是彼此的解药。经过一段时间的相处，他们也相互喜欢，只不过渡生开窍没那么快哈哈哈木头来的。（关于世子的身世有点惨）。然后在断亲方面上渡生真的非常的果断，不拖拖拉拉。在别的地方渡生有渡众生的慈悲但不圣母。背后的密谋以及世子母亲的尸骨等等还没有完全展开。但是看的非常有趣很值得一看"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1771514598,"group_id":"7579615885753584702","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"我想生命这卷书
